status_notes: Added 2026-07-10 to register the Barracuda Networks security glossary (extracted in CSA's private dataset repo). Org metadata from the vendor site.
notes: Security vendor (email, application, network, and data protection). Publishes a public cybersecurity glossary at /support/glossary. Country: United States.

data.description: Barracuda Networks' public cybersecurity glossary — vendor-authored term/definition entries covering email security, application and network security, data protection, and related concepts.
data.notes: Vendor copyright; publicly readable but not freely redistributable. Extracted term data is held in CSA's private dataset repo, not published.
